through December 

DESCRIPTION: The variable is the Part D plan benefit package (PBP) for the beneficiary’s Part D plan for a given 
month (January through December). CMS assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a 
Part D plan sponsor has with CMS. 

SHORT NAME: PTDPBPID01 
PTDPBPID02 
PTDPBPID03 
PTDPBPID04 
PTDPBPID05 
PTDPBPID06 
 PTDPBPID07 
PTDPBPID08 
PTDPBPID09 
PTDPBPID10 
PTDPBPID11 
PTDPBPID12 
LONG NAME: PTD_PBP_ID_01 
PTD_PBP_ID_02 
PTD_PBP_ID_03
